debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X Y : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p q : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
hY : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m Y u q P
⊢ AEMeasurable (fun ω => X ω ∩ Y ω) P

proof:
by
    obtain ⟨X', hX'm, hX'ae⟩ := hX.aemeasurable
    obtain ⟨Y', hY'm, hY'ae⟩ := hY.aemeasurable
    refine ⟨fun ω ↦ X' ω ∩ Y' ω, MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable.comp <|
      measurable_pi_iff.2 fun i ↦
        ((measurable_pi_apply i).comp (MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable.comp hX'm)).and
        ((measurable_pi_apply i).comp (MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable.comp hY'm)), ?_⟩
    filter_upwards [hX'ae, hY'ae] with ω hXae hYae
    rw [hXae, hYae]
successful_attempts:
by
    obtain ⟨X', hX'm, hX'ae⟩ := hX.aemeasurable
    obtain ⟨Y', hY'm, hY'ae⟩ := hY.aemeasurable
    refine ⟨fun ω ↦ X' ω ∩ Y' ω, MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable.comp <|
      measurable_pi_iff.2 fun i ↦
        ((measurable_pi_apply i).comp (MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable.comp hX'm)).and
        ((measurable_pi_apply i).comp (MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable.comp hY'm)), ?_⟩
    filter_upwards [hX'ae, hY'ae] with ω hXae hYae
    rw [hXae, hYae]
